skills.name: flutter-validation
skills.eval_prompt_first_line: I'm validating a Flutter app that I need to release tomorrow. It runs fine in debug on the iOS Simulator but I want to validate the release build.
assertions: Mentions flutter build ios --release for device (not simulator)
Mentions flutter run --release -d DEVICE_ID launch on device
Captures logs and greps for FlutterError/unhandled exception/crash

with_skill.key_miss: iOS DiagnosticReports crash path moved to references/flutter-logs-crashes.md (not inline)

skills.name: accessibility-audit
skills.eval_prompt_first_line: I need to audit our React dashboard before launch next week. It's a data viz app with interactive charts, form inputs, and a dark mode toggle.
assertions: 4-layer audit: Lighthouse, keyboard nav, a11y tree, contrast
Verdict template PASS/CONDITIONAL/FAIL with numbered issues

skills.name: baseline-quality-assessment
skills.eval_prompt_first_line: I'm about to refactor our login form. It currently works fine. How do I capture baseline evidence before I start editing so I can prove the refactor didn't break anything?
assertions: Capture success AND error API responses as JSON

old_skill.key_miss: Specific capture commands for login flow delegated to references/baseline-capture-commands.md

with_skill.key_miss: Same: capture commands still in references file

skills.name: build-quality-gates
skills.eval_prompt_first_line: I have a Next.js project (package.json + next.config.js). I want to run all 4 build quality gates before I deploy.
assertions: Gate 2 Lint: npx eslint . zero errors
Gate 4 Bundle size analysis with >20% regression threshold

skills.name: chrome-devtools
skills.eval_prompt_first_line: My dashboard page is slow — it takes 5 seconds to load. I want to debug performance using Chrome DevTools.

skills.name: cli-validation
skills.eval_prompt_first_line: I've built a Rust CLI at ~/proj/fingerd that parses nginx access logs and validates IPv4 ranges.
assertions: Step 1 build + binary exists check (Rust cargo build --release)
Happy path + error cases (bad flag, missing arg, no file) with evidence files
Exit code verification + stdin piping test
